tools.name: faf_validate
tools.description: Validate a .faf and return completeness score + errors/warnings (Rust→WASM, at the edge).

tools.name: faf_score
tools.description: Score a .faf — 0-100 completeness (Rust→WASM, at the edge).

tools.name: faf_read
tools.description: Parse a .faf and return its normalized structure (Rust→WASM, at the edge).
